## Affected surface

- [ ] `SPEC.md` (canonical specification)
- [ ] `spec/SPEC-*.md` (companion specification)
- [ ] `docs/*.md` (project documents)
- [ ] `internal/` (project rationale, planning)
- [ ] `reference/<impl>/` (reference implementation)
- [ ] `site/` (openmembership.org)
- [ ] `ietf/` (Internet-Draft)
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Compatibility

- [ ] Backward-compatible with 0.4
- [ ] Requires a version bump
- [ ] Editorial only (no normative effect)

## Checks

- [ ] No em-dashes (`—`) or en-dashes (`–`) introduced
- [ ] Cross-references and links resolve
- [ ] Spec example XML/JSON validates (if applicable)
- [ ] Reference-implementation tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Site builds cleanly (if `site/` touched)
